interface.dto_boundary: name string + enabled bool; not-found error if missing
interface.error_envelope: CoreError/poisoned-lock/parse/IO/write failures are formatted through invoke-visible IPC resolve envelope; success returns CoreEnvelope ok payload.

terminal_side_effect_classes: toggle enabled on existing MCP server then durable config.toml write

acceptance_mapping.unit: validate request DTO shape and success/error envelope for command
acceptance_mapping.manual: verify MCP page loading/result/error state for command
acceptance_mapping.e2e: mock invoke command, assert parameter assembly and rendered consumption path from frontend inventory

gate.allowedImplementationMode: Implement current macos AiMaMi 1.0.9 MCP behavior from same-platform IDA owner/callee/DTO/error/side-effect evidence.
